title: Zymo Quick-DNA/RNA Viral Kit with PCR Prep
author: Opentrons

steps.title: This protocol automates nucleic acid purification...
steps.instruction: This protocol automates nucleic acid purification with the [Zymo Quick-DNA/RNA Viral MagBead Kit](https://www.zymoresearch.com/collections/quick-dna-rna-viral-kits/products/quick-dna-rna-viral-magbead). This protocol is a continuation of the original Zymo Quick Extraction protocol which can be found in our Protocol Library [here](https://protocols.opentrons.com/protocol/zymo-quick). More specifically, this protocol distributes PCR mastermix to the plate before the elute is distributed. Using the P300 Multi-Channel Pipette and a Single-Channel Pipette, this protocol can accommodate up to 48 samples per run and can be configured to run any multiple of 8 up to 48. Starting with 400µL of sample in a deepwell plate, the entire process is automated and ends with 60µL of elution containing nucleic acid dispensed into a 96-well PCR plate.The elution is then ready for RT/qPCR, Next-Gen Sequencing, hybridization, etc. This kit can be used for Station B (RNA extraction) of our [COVID Workstation](https://blog.opentrons.com/how-to-use-opentrons-to-test-for-covid-19/). --- To purchase tips, reagents, or pipettes, please visit our [online store](https://shop.opentrons.com/) or contact our sales team at [info@opentrons.com](mailto:info@opentrons.com) * [Opentrons OT-2](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/ot-2-robot/products/ot-2) * [Opentrons OT-2 Run App (Version 3.19.0 or later)](https://opentrons.com/ot-app/) * [Opentrons Magnetic Module, GEN2](https://opentrons.com/modules#magnetic) * [Opentrons P300 Multi-Channel Pipette](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/ot-2-pipettes/products/8-channel-electronic-pipette) * (5) [Opentrons 200µL Filter Tips](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/opentrons-tips/products/opentrons-200ul-filter-tips) (recommended) or [Opentrons 300µL Tips](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/opentrons-tips/products/opentrons-300ul-tips) * [Opentrons P20 (or P10) Single-Channel Pipette](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/ot
